Author: Haselnussbomber
Name: HaselDebug
Changelog:
- Added: A context menu was added to the Beast Tribes and Custom Deliveries names to open the location on the map.
- Fixed: The coordinates of the closest aetherytes (used for Beast Tribes and Custom Deliveries) were not calculated correctly.

Author: Haselnussbomber
Name: HaselTweaks
Description:
There is a lot of tweaks with a bunch of options.
For a detailed description please visit the plugins repository or open /haseltweaks when installed.

- Achievement Link Tooltip
- Aether Current Helper
- Always Face Camera
- Auto Sorter
- Auto-open Recipe
- Auto-select Soil and Seed
- Background Music Keybind
- Bigger Character Previews
- Armoire Quick Store
- Cast Bar Aetheryte Names
- Character Class Switcher
- Character Reputation Teleport
- Commands
    - /itemlink [id]
    - /whatmount
    - /whatemote
    - /whatbarding
    - /glamourplate [id]
- Companion Color Preview
- Cosmic Research in Duty List
- Custom Chat Message Formats
- Custom Chat Timestamp
- DTR
    - Busy status
    - FPS
    - Instance number
- Disable Reward Popups
- Enhanced Crafting Log
    - Remember search history
- Enhanced Experience Bar
    - Companion Bar
    - Island Sanctuary Bar
    - PvP Series Bar 
- Enhanced Fitting Room
    - Keep Facewear on
- Enhanced Glamour Dresser
    - Automatically select missing items from the inventory when opening the Outfit Glamour Creation
- Enhanced Hunting Log
    - Remember last selected class
    - Automatically select the current class
    - Automatically set the filter to "Show Incomplete"
- Enhanced Isleworks Agenda
    - Search Bar
    - Disable item tooltips in the list
- Enhanced Login/Logout
    - Skip Logo
    - Show pets in character selection
    - Play emote in character selection
    - Preload territory when queued
    - Clear tell history on logout
- Enhanced Material List
    - Zone names of where to find the material
    - Click to open the map of where to find the material
    - Auto-refresh Material List/Recipe Tree
    - Restore Material List on Login
    - "Search for Item by Crafting Method" context menu entry
- Enhanced Target Info
    - Mounted status
    - Fashion Accessory status
    - Remove leading zero in HP under 10%
- Expert Deliveries
- Faster Decompression
- Fast Mouse Click Fix
- Flash Taskbar
    - Flash on alarm
    - Flash on combat
    - Flash on synthesis completion
- Fix Inventory Open Tab
- Forced Cutscene Sounds
- Gear Set Grid
- Glamour Dresser Alert
- Glamour Dresser Keyboard Navigation
- Hide MSQ Complete
- Inventory Highlight
- Keep Screen Awake
- Lock Window Position
- Market Board Item Preview
- Material Allocation
- Minimap Adjustments
    - Square Collision (for custom minimap mask textures)
    - Default Opacity
    - Hover Opacity
    - Hide Coordinates
    - Hide Weather
    - Hide Time Indicator
    - Hide Cardinal Directions
- Portrait Helper
    - Fine-grained controls for editing portraits
    - Import/Export preset codes
    - Load/Save presets
    - Alignment Tool
- Prevent Reel-In from Movement
- Reveal Duty Requirements
- Safer Market Board Price Check
- Scrollable Tabs
- Search the markets
- Shop Item Icons
- Simple Aethernet List
Punchline: A collection of quality of life tweaks.
Changelog:
HaselTweaks

Updated description for the Plugin Installer. It just lists all the tweaks now.

New Tweak: Character Reputation Teleport

Clicking an Allied Society in the Character window teleports you to the nearest Aetheryte instead of opening the map. Hold Shift to open the map normally.

Enhanced Login/Logout

- Changed/Fixed?: To prevent that the character is spawning with a T-Pose, the emote now plays once the character is visible.

Author: Haselnussbomber
Name: LeveHelper
Description: A little helper to check which Levequests have been completed and which are missing.

Author: Haselnussbomber
Name: Yo-kai Check
Description: Yo-kai Check is a small plugin to assist you in tracking the rewards of the Yo-kai Watch event.
Punchline: Tracking assistant for Yo-kai Watch rewards
Changelog:
- Added: The server info bar entry can not be clicked to open the plugin window.
- Added: The server info bar entry now shows the locations in which you can farm the medals in the tooltip.
- Added: In the table, the medal count of each weapon now also has a tooltip that shows the locations in which you can farm them. A location displayed in a green color is your current location.
- Added: In the table, the minion name can now be clicked to summon it and will be shown in a green color when it is currently summoned.
- Changed: The server info bar entry is now based on the currently summoned minion (previously it was based on inventory changes - the medals that were added) and will persist between zones until the minion is sent away or the weapon has been acquired.
